commands.title: Purple Bruce — Start
commands.description: Start the Purple Bruce cyberdeck server on :3000

commands.title: Purple Bruce — tmux deck
commands.description: Launch full 3-pane tmux layout: server + audit log + Lucy chat

commands.title: Purple Bruce — Doctor
commands.description: Full health check + auto-repair (Node, server, DB, AI keys, tools)

commands.title: Purple Bruce — Deck
commands.description: Cyberdeck status dashboard: RAM, uptime, provider, SOC status

commands.title: Purple Bruce — AI Team
commands.description: Show self-healing AI team status: Grok / Venice / Gemini

commands.title: Purple Bruce — Overclock
commands.description: 90-second neural overclock timer with glitch effect

commands.title: Purple Bruce — Stop
commands.cmd: pkill -f 'node server.js' && echo 'Purple Bruce stopped.' || echo 'Not running.'
